name: report-generation
purpose: Create Markdown or HTML artifacts from verified observations and conversation context.
activationGuidance: Use when the user asks for a report, HTML deliverable, Markdown deliverable, executive summary, or persisted artifact.
Use only after enough observations exist or when the user explicitly wants a report based on current conversation context.
Do not dump raw HTML in the chat response; choose create_artifact after evidence is available.

requires: source observation ids or synthesis context

finalAnswerRequirements: do not repeat full artifact source unless requested

qualityChecks: artifact is created through artifact.create adapter
artifact metadata includes source observations when available
duplicate content is de-duped by content hash
